textByHash.2a81861d251f9a9bdf5f97c1a54aad703ae265e2: I think he was back here quite recently, so I doubt he'll be back any time soon.
textByHash.3f16f428306b1529efe5e34fd8e621419f202e51: Oh come on! You in the Laughing Miner? The whole city knows about you and your dwarven drinking buddies!
textByHash.43fca653400f0382606c58b3be06b98c6205749c: The bank is Keldagrim-West. Hurry back!
textByHash.4701e9bd87ed1ca2900361ab58a146728fb9af84: Just go out in the streets, they can't be hard to find!
textByHash.523ede9a2eae3d6828e4126d5b98a16fe28ec566: I thought you would know plenty!
textByHash.60cbc3227be3eae7dde9a64c33726fe4e66e5630: Kebabs! Get your kebabs here! One gold each!
textByHash.6a0bf70c594f9419153622072b402128d6c47567: He's scaring away my customers, he says there's something wrong with my kebabs. Quite annoying fellow.
textByHash.925193f557a54c60732a8dcf815b3295e9adf362: Well, he does have a relative who wanders all over Gielinor. Comes back from time to time to buy more kebabs. Don't see him very often though.
textByHash.bcf6d3cb4ea716230dff675738b978c001c76796: That's still not very helpful. But let me see. There is one particularly drunken dwarf just to the northeast of here.
textByHash.f552fd55b17ce2b3ffbd5b3843c06afa11c3a184: Not really! I have a steady supply of meat coming in through the carts and I don't really need anything else!
textByHash.ff639bd34d7afe656c500544a386a19c9bd56b9f: Yes? Are you going to give me that one gold coin then?
